highlights.title: Language switching and bilingual docs
highlights.description: The desktop app supports language switching, with bilingual website docs and localized assistant personas.

highlights.title: Reader chat, search, and translation
highlights.description: Persistent chat and in-reader search while you read; bilingual web-article translation with locale-aligned assistant replies.

highlights.title: Reader toolbar and annotations
highlights.description: Unified floating toolbar with improved article header, empty notes, rail grouping, and distillation motion.

highlights.title: Settings, theme, and sound
highlights.description: Reworked Settings and Library IA, dusk indigo theme, hand-drawn paper picker, sound effects, and toast feedback.

highlights.title: Release-notes dialogs
highlights.description: The update flow shows release notes for the target version and bundled notes after update.

highlights.title: Security and stability
highlights.description: HTML sanitization, renderer sandbox, SQLite runtime packaging, and fixes across import, stats, and the annotation rail.
